name: @forgeax/engine-wgpu-wasm
description: Merged wgpu 29 + naga 29 wasm-bindgen crate exposing RHI + shader-pipeline raw bindings to JS; consumed by @forgeax/engine-rhi-wgpu + @forgeax/engine-naga thin shells. AI engine users do not import this package directly.

fps.reason: merged wasm crate is consumed by thin shells; fps reported by hello-triangle / hello-cube apps that drive rhi-wgpu / naga

bench.reason: no hot path bench at the merged wasm boundary; naga compile-time bench pending feat-future-shader-compile-time, wgpu hot path bench pending feat-future-rhi-bench

gate.reason: smoke gate is anchored at apps/hello/triangle smoke + browser test renderer-wgpu-wasm.browser.test.ts; merged wasm crate has no standalone binary gate

spike-report.reason: not a spike package; this is the productionised merge of two archived legacy crates (naga wasm shim + packages/rhi-wgpu/crate; feat-20260511-naga-rhi-wgpu-merge M1), sized by the bundle-size MetricKind above
